headline: HR & IT Manager
tagline: Over 18 years across information technology and people operations.
summary: HR and IT Manager with over 18 years of experience spanning information technology and people operations. I began my career in IT engineering — building and maintaining networks, systems, and security infrastructure — and have grown into leading teams and managing both the technology and human sides of an organisation. I focus on keeping operations dependable: secure, reliable IT systems on one hand, and well-coordinated, well-supported people on the other.

contact.location: Al Khobar, Eastern Province, Saudi Arabia

bullets: Lead the company's IT infrastructure — operating systems, servers, email, security tools, and end-user devices — ensuring secure, reliable day-to-day operations.
Manage and mentor the IT team, coordinating workloads, priorities, and professional development.
Oversee HR functions including team management, recruitment support, and staff coordination.
Develop network troubleshooting strategies that reduce downtime and lower maintenance costs.
Research and evaluate emerging technologies, hardware, and software against business needs.
Maintain hardware and software inventory and lead procurement and vendor negotiation.
Installed and maintained software, networking systems, and high-level security infrastructure.
Troubleshot and resolved network, hardware, and software issues across the organisation.
Configured and supported computer hardware and end-user systems.
Managed installation and configuration of computer hardware, software, and networks.
Provided IT support and security setup across departments.
Diagnosed and resolved hardware, software, and networking issues.

education.institution: Kongu Polytechnic College, Tamil Nadu, India
